sections.paragraph:
Original: משׁחה משׁחה

Transliteration: mishchâh moshchâh

Phonetic: meesh-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. consecrated portion, anointing oil, portion, ointment, anointing portion
    1. ointment (used to consecrate by anointing)
    2. anointing portion

Origin: from H4886

TWOT entry: 1255a,1255b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
